mapper.insert: insert into private_message (sender_id, receiver_id, message_type, content, file_url, file_name, file_size , is_read, is_recall, send_time) values (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{isRead}, #{isRecall}, #{sendTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE private_message SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE (sender_id = #{receiverId} AND receiver_id = #{currentUserId}) AND is_read = 0
mapper.delete:
delete from private_message where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT sender_id as friendId, COUNT(*) as count FROM private_message WHERE receiver_id = #{currentUserId} AND is_read = 0 AND is_recall = 0 AND sender_id IN #{id} GROUP BY sender_id
